2130050.name: Time Shock
2130050.description:
THE FUTURE ISN'T WRITTEN

The machines think they've already won. They've seen a thousand futures where humanity dies.

There is one thing they haven't counted on.

You're humanity's time-traveling wildcard, the variable they didn't factor in. Storm the futures they're building. Steal the blueprints before they're drawn. Sabotage their rise before it begins. Fight with weaponized war rigs through:

  • Cyberpunk cities that have fallen to the machines.

  • Moon bases where the last transmissions went cold.

  • Mechanized planets where all life is extinct.

  • Nuclear wastelands seconds from meltdown.

Every future you hit, you bend the timeline  in our favor.

YOUR RIG IS YOUR LIFELINE 

Choose from a wide range of futuristic combat vehicles, including:

  • Racers

  • Sci-fi hovercraft

  • Moon Buggies

  • Armored cars

The right vehicle will make the difference.

WEAPONS FROM THE FUTURE

Every upgrade is a chance to take back the future. Strip parts from burning tomorrows.

  • Railguns

  • Plasma Rifles (Bug Zapper)

  • Energy Rifles

  • Sniper Rifles

  • Sticky Bombs

  • Rocket Launchers

  • Quantum Shields

Your build decides which timeline survives.

THE AI THINK IT'S INEVITABLE

Combat a range of lethal robots.

  • Dismember mech spiders

  • Destroy kamikaze swarms

  • Outwit drones that hunt in packs

  • Take on giant robot bosses

Break their math. Rewrite their code. Make them remember what fear feels like.

HERE'S HOW WE'RE DOING THIS:

FREE DEMO - Mission one. Full experience. See if you've got what it takes.

Episode One - $9.99 - Four missions where you punch your first holes in their timeline. This is where you prove the machines can lose.

Full Campaign - $19.99 - If Episode One hits, we unleash five additional missions based on your feedback. Deeper timelines. Bigger stakes.

Already own Episode One? Episode Two is free.

We're building this with you. Your feedback shapes the war. No corporate garbage. No "buy now, regret later." Just honest game dev and a story built by hand.

PC. MAC. STEAM DECK. SOON.

The machines have a plan. You're about to rewrite it.

Closed beta live now. Demo incoming,

英语*
